de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.proofevent

Class RuleAppInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.proofevent.RuleAppInfo

  • public class RuleAppInfo
extends Object
    More specific information about a rule application (currently information about added and removed formulas)

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      (package private) RuleApp app
      RuleApp this event reports
      (package private) ImmutableList<NodeReplacement> newNodes
      New nodes that have been introduced by this rule application
      (package private) Node originalNode
      Node the rule has been applied on
